title: Ice Cream Sundae Glasses - Set of 4 Tall 350ml Milkshake Glasses with Classic Clear Design - Retro American Diner Style Knickerbocker Glory Glass, Dishwasher Safe, Ideal for Dessert (4 PCS)
features: CLASSIC ICE CREAM SUNDAE GLASSES - Add a touch of nostalgic charm to your dining table service, restaurant, or diner with this 4 pack of US diner-style, retro ice cream bowls (Diameter: 8.5 cm, Height: 18 cm).

PERFECT FOR SWEET DELICACIES - A traditional ice cream sundae, dessert, soda fountain, or American milkshake isn’t complete without a US diner-style tall ice cream sundae glass! Diners love the unique, vintage, long glass design.

TRANSPARENT WITH HIGH CLARITY - Serve ice cream floats, sundaes, milkshakes, sodas, gelato, sorbet, and smoothies in style. A memorable dining experience with a delectable layered sundae display is absolutely priceless!

DURABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN - These 350ml milkshake glasses are dishwasher safe and ideal for home, kitchen or professional use. Each thick, sturdy milkshake glass features a secure pedestal base to prevent messy spills.

4-PIECE RETRO GIFT SET - Ice cream enthusiasts love this classic knickerbocker glory glasses set. Purchase these dessert glasses as a thoughtful gift for housewarming parties, birthdays, and weddings!
description: Product Description Perfect Party Addition These ice cream glasses would make an excellent addition to any housewarming party, birthday, or wedding! You don't need to worry about spillage as each glass features a secure pedestal base. So Many Uses There are so many desserts or drinks you could serve up in these vintage style glasses, such as ice cream sundaes, soda fountains, milkshakes, gelato, sorbet, smoothies, and much more! American Diner Style Perfect for both at home or professional use, these nostalgic ice cream glasses add charm to your dining experience. They are dishwasher safe, so can be used again and again. HEFTMAN Ice Cream Sundae Glasses - Pack of 4 Step up your dining table service or at-home ice cream bar with this classic ice cream sundae glasses set of 4! These tall glass sundae dishes are reminiscent of American diners with a vintage design. Each desert glass is dishwasher safe, transparent, and includes a pedestal base to prevent messy spills.
